mechanism: Fiscal cash flows sustain corporate revenues even as financial conditions tighten, suppressing the credit deterioration that historically preceded labor weakness. This either extends the lead time (12-24 months vs. 3-12 months) or distorts the signal level itself
regime_dependence: Only operative at large fiscal deficits (>4% GDP). The 1966-69 episode is the primary analogue but may be a category error due to different credit market structure.
